name: Jam Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a bowl.
2. Add cream cheese, maple syrup, and lemon juice to the melted butter. Mix well.
3. Gradually add flour until the dough is smooth and combined.
4. Refrigerate the dough overnight.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch (0.25 inches).
6. Cut into 3-inch rounds.
7. Make an indentation in the center of each round with your finger.
8. Spoon jam or preserves into each indentation.
9. Bake on oiled cookie sheets at 450°F for 15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and possibly flaking. If not, return to bake for additional few minutes.
